hero_desc: The first protocol where every purchase is an act of asset sovereignty. No external shareholders. No platform tax. Just mathematics — written into code.
formula_note: As the fund numerator grows linearly with every transaction, the supply denominator shrinks exponentially across Fibonacci tiers. Deterministic scarcity — not sentiment.
s1_desc: We benchmark against Vanguard, the world's largest mutual fund. No external shareholders. Every consumption act transformed into a deterministic digital asset.
s1_c1_d: Not a platform — a decentralized commercial protocol. The consumption premium returns to MAO DAO members on-chain, not to shareholders or advertisers.
s1_c2_d: Every purchase mints a digital asset that grows alongside global sales volume. Your spending becomes a treasury position — not a fee to a middleman.
s1_c3_d: Japan Quality Standard integration. Every item is material-compliance verified before entering the protocol. Identical factories as top Japanese labels. 15% hard boundary — enforced by code.
s2_desc: Traditional platforms control users through bid-ranking and big-data price discrimination. Maollar returns the power of selection — permanently.
s2_c1_d: All products screened via JQS and converted into pure semantic vector data. AI reads protocol truth, not sponsored rankings.
s2_c2_d: Exclusive API keys. Private AI assistants. Rational comparisons by quality, price, and supply chain provenance — not ad revenue. Silicon-First. Interface-Zero.
s2_c3_d: Shopping intent stays on your local AI. Maollar acts only as data provider and settlement layer — zero access to your behavioral profile.
s3_desc: From fiat ingress to on-chain asset unfreezing — every step is deterministic, auditable, and mathematically enforced on Solana Mainnet.
s3_l1_d: Users purchase physical goods using mainstream fiat (USD / CNY / EUR). Standard retail checkout — no crypto knowledge required.
s3_l2_d: Supply chain products AI-structured — material, weight, origin — enabling instant agent comprehension at the protocol layer.
s3_l3_d: On successful transaction, 10% profit automatically allocated to the audited MaoDAO independent fund. Code-enforced. Immutable.
s3_l4_d: System issues Maocoins at the current Fibonacci Milestone tier. Issuance decreases sharply as milestones advance.
s3_l5_d: Points issuance and holding verified via Merkle Trees on Solana. Every record immutable. Every balance auditable in real-time.
s3_l6_d: Points display on payment, formally unfrozen on delivery confirmation. Physical delivery is the cryptographic proof of value release.
s3_l7_d: Dual-layer isolation: mall handles points; independent clearing gateway converts 1:1 to MAO. Complete business logic decoupling.
s3_l8_d: MaoDAO Secured Vault holds 100% equity in MaoMall entity. Management permanently aligned with consumer interests — by protocol, not promise.
s4_desc: Four nodes, one closed-loop value system. Hover the diagram to reveal in full color.
s4_cap: Protocol Architecture · MaoDAO Vault · AI Selection Agent · MaoMall · Solana Mainnet
s5_desc: Linear treasury growth (fiat) + exponential issuance halving (MAO) = deterministic scarcity. Not a projection. Written into the smart contract.
s5_ti1_d: Grows with every purchase. 10% of every transaction flows into the Vault. More consumption = larger numerator = higher intrinsic MAO value.
s5_ti2_d: Issuance speed decreases sharply across Fibonacci Milestone tiers. Each tier issues fewer tokens — accelerating scarcity while the fund grows.
s5_ti3_d: Every on-chain interaction permanently purges 0.5% of circulating supply from the physical layer. Burn compounds scarcity beyond issuance decay alone.
s5_ti4_d: Initial issuance of 100M Maocoins. Allocated to Raydium/Orca liquidity pools, JQS maintenance, and global API infrastructure.
s5_chart_s: Institutional Grade Analysis — MAO Unit Value (G Series) vs Token Count (D Series) · Hover to reveal in full color
s5_cap: Tokenomics Value and Scarcity Projections · Fibonacci Tier Model · SVG Dynamic Engine
s5_cn1_d: Early tiers carry 1000x+ reward multipliers. As protocol complexity increases, reward density decreases — mathematically enforced by Fibonacci tier logic.
s5_cn2_d: MAO token count drops sharply after Genesis tier. Each subsequent level issues exponentially fewer tokens while the MaoDAO fund continues steady linear growth.
s5_cn3_d: Every transaction permanently reduces circulating supply. As volume scales, burn acceleration compounds scarcity beyond what the issuance curve alone projects.
s6_desc: Registered in Singapore. Legally segregated treasury. On-chain auditable transparency. Designed so management cannot move user assets — by architecture, not by trust.
s6_c1_d: Mall front-end operates as a 'Consumption Points Incentive Program' — global retail compliance. Zero crypto exposure at point-of-sale.
s6_c2_d: Points-to-MAO conversions on a physically isolated clearing layer — complete decoupling of retail business logic and digital asset transactions.
s6_c3_d: Funds secured by Segregated Witness and hardware-locked Multi-Signature governance. Fund balances mapped to Solana in real-time.
s6_c4_d: Treasury legally siloed via Non-profit Foundation Law. Management cannot access reserves unilaterally — by law and by code.
s6_c5_d: Mathematical finality in under 400ms on the world's highest-throughput chain. Cryptographic proof on every transaction.
s6_c6_d: MAO is the sole redemption voucher for the fund. Holders can initiate unconditional buyback at fair value at any time — protocol-enforced.
mnf_q: "When you execute a purchase, you are not consuming. You are exercising your Asset Sovereignty through code. Every product is a minted token. Every factory is your node."
mnf_a: — Maollar Protocol Manifesto · On-chain decreed since 2026
ft_desc:
Autonomous Protocol. Community Owned.
Consumer-Owned · AI-Driven · Mathematically Appreciating.

Registered in Singapore · Settled on Solana Mainnet
